tools_used: temporary PDF page rendering and visual inspection
helpful: The document manifest accurately identified the petition as a scan with empty extracted text.
The official filing URL allowed recovery of the questions presented.
Fee-class and procedural-signal base rates supported calibrated probability adjustment.
gaps: Provisioned OCR text for scanned filings would avoid manual visual recovery.
The corpus query lacks originating-court and cert-stage filters for genuinely similar priors.
notes: The broad SCOTUS corpus query returned a salience-ranked recent set rather than close analogues, so the statpack and petition-specific record carried substantially more weight.
